layoutRegions.name: closeout-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Track closed escalations, owner acknowledgements, breach outcomes, and ledger gaps.

layoutRegions.name: closeout-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare closed receipt escalations by outcome, proof, status, owner, and progress.

layoutRegions.name: audit-ledger-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect owner acknowledgements, breach outcomes, retry transcript retention, checksum repair proof, reviewer packets, and rollback-safe ledger commands.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact closeout counter with semantic status tone.

components.name: CloseoutCard
components.purpose: Closed escalation card showing outcome, proof, status, and ledger progress.
interactions: status chip maps to closeout state

components.name: LedgerRow
components.purpose: Rollback-safe audit ledger row with retained proof details.
interactions: proof text remains readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
